SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---LARRY ARANA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.
